# Vendored Upstream

This directory contains `win-nightlight-lib` copied from:

- Repository: https://github.com/kvnxiao/win-nightlight-cli
- Commit: `7a94ef98ee83d287241d46485b48490a48ac16ee`
- License: MIT

The code is vendored so `wnlctl` has a fixed, auditable Night Light registry
implementation. Local modifications may exist in this repository. When updating
it, copy the new upstream library intentionally, record the new commit here, and
re-run the validation checks.
